description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle featuring a wooden stock with a natural grain finish, extending into a robust metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle is equipped with a telescopic scope mounted on top, suggesting it is designed for precision shooting at long distances. The barrel is long and slender, capped with a cylindrical suppressor at the muzzle, which reduces firing noise. The trigger guard and bolt handle are clearly visible, indicating manual cycling of the action. The magazine is not externally visible, implying it may be an internal or flush-fit design. The overall appearance is that of a classic hunting or sniper rifle, blending traditional woodwork with modern tactical enhancements.
description: A bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, telescopic scope, and a long barrel fitted with a suppressor. It combines classic wood and metal construction with modern precision features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, scope, and suppressor clearly.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the suppressor and barrel alignment, with the stock and scope mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, scope, and suppressor, with bolt handle visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and scope, with the barrel and suppressor extending away.
